negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_e1630a59-91c7-4375-b5ca-f78235492555
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out through the windshield onto a sunny day. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds, and the sun shines brightly overhead. A chain-link fence runs parallel to the road, separating the viewer's perspective from a parking lot where a black bus is parked. A white pickup truck is visible further down the street. Trees and greenery are visible behind the fence, adding a touch of nature to the otherwise urban setting. As the video progresses, the ego vehicle cautiously approaches the back of the bus, as the left-side door begins to open.
